override_keys.sid_sid: sid.sid (key prefixed with sid_ to disambiguate from comparative shd)

meta.reason_audit_1: See docs/audit.md bug §1. bnmetrics 0.1.x crashes in SID when possible_pa_gp is empty; v0.2 special-cases this and produces the correct value. Pairs where legacy SID was skipped have v0.2 reclaiming with frozen values (keys: sid_sid, sid_lower_bound, sid_upper_bound).
meta.reason_audit_6: See docs/audit.md bug §6. bnmetrics 0.1.x SID iterates set(g.nodes()) (hash-seed-dependent), which produces different mmm row orderings and thus different lower/upper bound attribution to specific DAGs in the equivalence class. v0.2 uses sorted index ordering. The actual sid value (= count of mis-classified pairs) usually agrees; lower/upper bounds may differ for CPDAG cases.
meta.reason_audit_7: See docs/audit.md bug §7. bnmetrics 0.1.x undercounts reversals when g1 has a directed edge u→v and g2 has it as undirected, but the undirected edge is stored in nx.DiGraph as v→u (the opposite storage direction). v0.2 counts orientation differences correctly regardless of nx storage direction.
meta.reason_perturbation_anomaly: random_n20_p10_2__vs__perturbed: v0.2=7, legacy=12. Pure DAG-vs-DAG (no CPDAG ambiguity), gp_is_essential_graph=True throughout. Investigation pending; v0.2 value frozen as expected for now.
